free_text: Excitation functions and nuclear charge dispersion in
the fission of uranium by 0.1- to 6.2-GeV protons
Errors include uncertainties in decay curve
analysis, counting efficiencies and chemical yields.
Average values were obtained by weighting the indivi-
dual results by reciprocals of their errors, and mean
deviations were calculated without weighting factors.
Data taken from PR,129,1809,1963--Tables I, II,
reaction coding, converted to lower case, corrections
